response.justification: Candidate is an experienced full-stack software engineer with strong web, backend, and some embedded/DLang experience, but the role requires deep hardware-focused expertise in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator performance architecture, and hardware-software co-design. The resume shows no evidence of GPU/SIMD/MIMD architecture work, deep neural network training/inference optimization, or silicon performance modeling. Educational background (BS in CS) combined with software-only experience does not align with a Principal Performance Architect role for AI accelerators.
strengths: Strong full-stack and systems engineering breadth across many languages
Some low-latency, high-throughput service experience at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
Long track record of senior IC contributions and technical leadership
concerns: No SoC/IP modeling, hardware architecture, or silicon performance experience
No GPU, SIMD/MIMD, or deep-learning workload optimization background
Career is product/web software focused, not hardware-software co-design

key_factors.factor: Lack of SoC/IP modeling and hardware architecture experience
No AI accelerator or DNN optimization background
